text.title: Video Gen Basics — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON shape returned by generate(). Carries local_path, provider, seed, duration, aspect_ratio, prompt_hash, cached flag, and the ffprobe-verified file metadata.

section.title: JSON Schema
section.code: { "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema", "$id": "faion://video-gen-basics/output.schema.json", "type": "object", "required": ["status", "local_path", "provider", "duration_s", "aspect_ratio", "seed", "prompt_hash", "cached"], "properties": { "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["ok", "failed", "timeout", "policy_violation"]}, "local_path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}, "provider": {"type": "string", "enum": ["runway", "luma", "replicate", "pika"]}, "duration_s": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0, "maximum": 10.0}, "aspect_ratio": {"type": "string", "enum": ["16:9", "9:16", "1:1", "4:3", "21:9"]}, "seed": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0}, "prompt_hash": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^[a-f0-9]{64}$"}, "cached": {"type": "boolean"}, "task_id": {"type": "string", "description": "provider task/generation id; required when cached==false"}, "video_url": {"type": "string", "description": "provider pre-signed URL; downloaded already, kept for replay"}, "ffprobe": {"type": "object", "description": "ffprobe-emitted file metadata"}, "error": {"type": "string"} }, "additionalProperties": false }

list.item: status — "ok" only after ffprobe validation passes (file size > 0, duration > 0, video stream present).
local_path — non-empty filesystem path; pre-signed URLs MUST be downloaded before this field is populated.
seed — caller can re-submit with the same seed for near-identical regeneration.
prompt_hash — sha256 of (prompt_text + provider + seed + duration + aspect_ratio).
task_id — present whenever cached==false; required for retry / re-query against the provider.

antipattern.description: status "ok" with local_path empty or pointing to a 0-byte file.
antipattern.reason: Either ffprobe was skipped or the provider returned an empty SUCCEEDED — downstream pipelines will fail later with cryptic ffmpeg errors.
Pre-signed URLs expire in 30-60 minutes. A bare URL leaks state; callers must download immediately.
Exceeds rule r5-clip-cap-5s. Multi-clip sequences must be concatenated via ffmpeg, not generated as one long call.

example.note: Invalid: empty local_path, duration > 10s, negative seed, prompt_hash not sha256.

list.item: local_path exists on disk and file size > 100 KB (rough lower bound for 1s 720p mp4).
ffprobe shows at least one video stream and duration_s within [0.5, 10.0].
